## Meeting Purpose

[Hiring manager screen for Technical Managing Editor role at growthx.ai with candidate Nathalie Schrans.](https://fathom.video/share/54t1Wwq94VKryuVSQDyscpxWEfk6x-sB?tab=summary&timestamp=24.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Nathalie has 10 years of marketing experience, with 6+ years in content marketing, primarily B2B SaaS](https://fathom.video/share/54t1Wwq94VKryuVSQDyscpxWEfk6x-sB?tab=summary&timestamp=108.0)
  - [She has 2.5 years of experience with AI tools and workflows, including prompt engineering and quality control](https://fathom.video/share/54t1Wwq94VKryuVSQDyscpxWEfk6x-sB?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)
  - [The role is \~60% workflow engineering, 40% content, requiring strong articulation of process improvements](https://fathom.video/share/54t1Wwq94VKryuVSQDyscpxWEfk6x-sB?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)
  - [growthx.ai's approach involves treating workflows as "writers" with human oversight and continuous improvement](https://fathom.video/share/54t1Wwq94VKryuVSQDyscpxWEfk6x-sB?tab=summary&timestamp=419.0)

## Topics

### Candidate Background and Experience

  - [10 years in marketing, 6+ years in content marketing (primarily B2B SaaS)](https://fathom.video/share/54t1Wwq94VKryuVSQDyscpxWEfk6x-sB?tab=summary&timestamp=108.0)
  - [Agency experience working with various tech companies at different stages](https://fathom.video/share/54t1Wwq94VKryuVSQDyscpxWEfk6x-sB?tab=summary&timestamp=126.0)
  - [Expanded from long-form content to social media, email, and other channels](https://fathom.video/share/54t1Wwq94VKryuVSQDyscpxWEfk6x-sB?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)
  - [2.5 years of experience with AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, AirOps) for workflow efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/54t1Wwq94VKryuVSQDyscpxWEfk6x-sB?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)
  - [Strong focus on AI output quality control and fact-checking](https://fathom.video/share/54t1Wwq94VKryuVSQDyscpxWEfk6x-sB?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)

### Role Requirements and Company Approach

  - [Not a software engineering role, but requires understanding of workflow processes](https://fathom.video/share/54t1Wwq94VKryuVSQDyscpxWEfk6x-sB?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)
  - [Workflows treated as "writers" with human oversight (like an assignment editor)](https://fathom.video/share/54t1Wwq94VKryuVSQDyscpxWEfk6x-sB?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)
  - [Continuous improvement of workflows through context, prompt, and pipeline engineering](https://fathom.video/share/54t1Wwq94VKryuVSQDyscpxWEfk6x-sB?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Need for articulating why content is good/bad and how to improve workflow artifacts](https://fathom.video/share/54t1Wwq94VKryuVSQDyscpxWEfk6x-sB?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)
  - [Emphasis on nimbleness to adapt to rapidly changing AI capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/54t1Wwq94VKryuVSQDyscpxWEfk6x-sB?tab=summary&timestamp=599.0)

### Process Improvement Example

  - [Nathalie improved an AirOps workflow for keyword-to-article creation](https://fathom.video/share/54t1Wwq94VKryuVSQDyscpxWEfk6x-sB?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
  - [Identified issues in brief and outline quality, leading to irrelevant content](https://fathom.video/share/54t1Wwq94VKryuVSQDyscpxWEfk6x-sB?tab=summary&timestamp=794.0)
  - [Enhanced brief creation process with structured outlines, internal link suggestions, and SERP analysis](https://fathom.video/share/54t1Wwq94VKryuVSQDyscpxWEfk6x-sB?tab=summary&timestamp=904.0)
  - [Resulted in significant quality improvement, praised by the editor](https://fathom.video/share/54t1Wwq94VKryuVSQDyscpxWEfk6x-sB?tab=summary&timestamp=959.0)

### Quality Review and Content Priorities

  - [Focus on providing value to human readers beyond AI-optimized content](https://fathom.video/share/54t1Wwq94VKryuVSQDyscpxWEfk6x-sB?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Inclusion of real-world examples or hypothetical scenarios](https://fathom.video/share/54t1Wwq94VKryuVSQDyscpxWEfk6x-sB?tab=summary&timestamp=1164.0)
  - [Specificity and clear next steps for readers](https://fathom.video/share/54t1Wwq94VKryuVSQDyscpxWEfk6x-sB?tab=summary&timestamp=1192.0)
  - [Balancing SEO/competitor research with client's unique messaging and data](https://fathom.video/share/54t1Wwq94VKryuVSQDyscpxWEfk6x-sB?tab=summary&timestamp=904.0)
  - [Adapting to changing measurement metrics in the AI era, focusing on "vibes and value"](https://fathom.video/share/54t1Wwq94VKryuVSQDyscpxWEfk6x-sB?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)

### Candidate's Work Preferences

  - [Enjoys client interactions and subject matter expert interviews for deeper understanding](https://fathom.video/share/54t1Wwq94VKryuVSQDyscpxWEfk6x-sB?tab=summary&timestamp=1625.0)
  - [Passionate about building and improving processes/workflows to solve problems](https://fathom.video/share/54t1Wwq94VKryuVSQDyscpxWEfk6x-sB?tab=summary&timestamp=1732.0)
  - [Excited about the opportunity to create workflows that impact many people](https://fathom.video/share/54t1Wwq94VKryuVSQDyscpxWEfk6x-sB?tab=summary&timestamp=1906.0)

## Next Steps

  - growthx.ai team to review Nathalie's candidacy and determine fit for the Technical Managing Editor role
  - Potential follow-up communication regarding next steps in the hiring process
